frictions.description: The parent-specified class TS_O2CProvenanceAndOperationalViewTest does not exist in this checkout, so the exact initial Maven command only executed TS_O2CListenerProformaInvoiceBoundaryTest.
frictions.resolution: Ran a second targeted Maven command against TS_O2CDispatchProvenanceAndRetiredRouteBoundaryTest#pureFactoryDispatchViews_redactPricingInvoiceGstCostAndJournalFields, which matches the factory-view assertion coverage.

frictions: The narrow verification stayed within one truthsuite class, but Maven still recompiled the module before executing the targeted test class.
